Magical Ward.title: Aethel-Locked Door
Magical Ward.narrative: A shimmering blue barrier bars the way. Strange runes pulse in response to your presence.

Mechanical Lock.title: Ancient Gears
Mechanical Lock.narrative: A massive stone door with a series of interlocking bronze gears. Some parts seem jammed.

Riddle Statue.title: The Silent Sentinel
Riddle Statue.narrative: An iron statue stands in the center of the hall, pointing towards an inscription: 'What speaks without a mouth?'
